summary: Iteration 52 testing complete: All features verified working. CineBoard performance optimization (bulk queries), multiple screenwriters (1-5), bottom nav updates (CineBoard/Bozze), and cast skills integrity all confirmed functional.

issues: Many 400/429 errors in console from avatar generation rate limiting (cosmetic, does not break functionality)

critical_code_review_comments: CineBoard endpoints use bulk queries for owners and likes - verified in code and API response
MongoDB indexes created on startup: films.status, people.role_type, likes compound index - verified in server.py lines 8391-8403
FilmCreate model accepts screenwriter_ids: List[str] for 1-5 screenwriters - verified in model and API
Cast members have exactly 8 skills each with values 1-100 - verified via API and UI
Cast IMDb ratings are non-zero (based on skills, fame, experience) - verified via API
Bottom nav shows 'CineBoard' (renamed from Social) and 'Bozze' (new) icons - verified in UI
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 52 features verified: 1) CineBoard endpoints (/api/cineboard/now-playing, /api/cineboard/hall-of-fame, /api/cineboard/attendance) return bulk data with owners and likes in single response. 2) Multiple screenwriters (1-5) working in FilmWizard step 3 with '0/5 selezionati' badge. 3) Cast skills are exactly 8 per member with values 1-100. 4) Cast IMDb ratings are non-zero. 5) Bottom nav shows CineBoard and Bozze icons on mobile.
